evidence_summary: Establish the metaphysical shift through a visual confrontation between the protagonist's new naked form and his former clothed, armed corpse. The scene must emphasize the physical distance and spatial relationship between the two entities to ground the sup...

Having broken free, the protagonist stands up only to realize he is naked. He looks down to see his own physical body—clothed and armed—lying lifeless on the cave floor. He realizes he has undergone a metaphysical metamorphosis.
Confusion to Existential Horror and Shock.
protagonist is rising from the cave floor, disoriented.
protagonist stands paralyzed in shock overlooking his corpse.
The protagonist rises, realizes his nudity, and discovers his dead physical self.
